Code for linear models

Contact: Lia Ossanna, lossanna@arizona.edu or lossanna@nmsu.edu
Last updated: 2026-05-05

This document includes the R code needed to produce the linear models presented in “Precipitation and slope angle moderate associations between native shrubs and invasive buffelgrass (Pennisetum ciliare) growth in the Sonoran Desert” by Ossanna et al. (2026). Code was run with R v4.5.3.

Models:

  1. Change in total buffelgrass culm count
  2. Change in reproductive buffelgrass culm count
  3. Change in buffelgrass plot density
  4. Change in buffelgrass plot cover
  5. Buffelgrass seedling survival
  6. Simple linear regression to accompany supplemental figures

Setup

library(readr) # v2.2.0
library(dplyr) # v1.2.0
library(ggplot2) # v4.0.2
library(lme4) # v1.1-38
library(lmerTest) # v3.2-0
library(DHARMa) # v0.4.7
library(performance) # v0.16.0
library(modelbased) # v0.13.0

# Load data ---------------------------------------------------------------

culm.change.raw <- read_csv("culm-data.csv")
plot.change.raw <- read_csv("plot-data.csv")
survival.dat.raw <- read_csv("survival-data.csv")

# Data wrangling ----------------------------------------------------------

# Center and scale numeric variables for culm change data
culm.change <- culm.change.raw %>% 
  mutate(PlotSlope_scaled = scale(PlotSlope, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Prev_year_precip_scaled = scale(Prev_year_precip, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Change_BGDensity_scaled = scale(Change_BGDensity, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Change_ShrubCover_scaled = scale(Change_ShrubCover, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Change_HerbCover_scaled = scale(Change_HerbCover, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Change_BGCover_scaled = scale(Change_BGCover, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Init_BGDensity_scaled = scale(Init_BGDensity, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Init_ShrubCover_scaled = scale(Init_ShrubCover, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Init_HerbCover_scaled = scale(Init_HerbCover, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Init_BGCover_scaled = scale(Init_BGCover, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1])

# Center and scale numeric variables for plot-level data
plot.change <- plot.change.raw %>% 
  mutate(PlotSlope_scaled = scale(PlotSlope, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Prev_year_precip_scaled = scale(Prev_year_precip, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Change_ShrubCover_scaled = scale(Change_ShrubCover, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Change_HerbCover_scaled = scale(Change_HerbCover, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Change_BGCover_scaled = scale(Change_BGCover, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Init_BGDensity_scaled = scale(Init_BGDensity, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Init_ShrubCover_scaled = scale(Init_ShrubCover, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Init_HerbCover_scaled = scale(Init_HerbCover, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         Init_BGCover_scaled = scale(Init_BGCover, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1])


# Center and scale numeric variables for survival data
dat.survival <- survival.dat.raw %>% 
  mutate(Prev_year_precip_scaled = scale(Prev_year_precip, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         PlotSlope_scaled = scale(PlotSlope, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         ShrubCover_scaled = scale(ShrubCover, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         HerbCover_scaled = scale(HerbCover, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         PlotSlope_scaled = scale(PlotSlope, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1],
         BGDensity_scaled = scale(BGDensity, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[, 1])

1. Change in total culm count

Construct model

total <- lmer(Change_TotalCulms ~ Prev_year_precip_scaled +  
                 PlotSlope_scaled + Change_BGDensity_scaled +
                 Change_ShrubCover_scaled + Change_HerbCover_scaled +
                 Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_BGDensity_scaled +
                 Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_ShrubCover_scaled +
                 Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_HerbCover_scaled +
                 Init_BGDensity_scaled + Init_ShrubCover_scaled + Init_HerbCover_scaled +
                 Change_ShrubCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled +
                 Change_HerbCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled +
                 (1 | Site / Transect / Plot / Plant_ID),
               data = culm.change)

Examine diagnostics

summary(total)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: Change_TotalCulms ~ Prev_year_precip_scaled + PlotSlope_scaled +  
##     Change_BGDensity_scaled + Change_ShrubCover_scaled + Change_HerbCover_scaled +  
##     Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_BGDensity_scaled + Prev_year_precip_scaled *  
##     Change_ShrubCover_scaled + Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_HerbCover_scaled +  
##     Init_BGDensity_scaled + Init_ShrubCover_scaled + Init_HerbCover_scaled +  
##     Change_ShrubCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled + Change_HerbCover_scaled *  
##     PlotSlope_scaled + (1 | Site/Transect/Plot/Plant_ID)
##    Data: culm.change
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 12153.4
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -4.7216 -0.5110 -0.0539  0.4011  5.2123 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups                      Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Plant_ID:Plot:Transect:Site (Intercept)  39.74    6.304  
##  Plot:Transect:Site          (Intercept)  51.72    7.192  
##  Transect:Site               (Intercept)  57.29    7.569  
##  Site                        (Intercept) 334.69   18.295  
##  Residual                                786.08   28.037  
## Number of obs: 1268, groups:  
## Plant_ID:Plot:Transect:Site, 782; Plot:Transect:Site, 80; Transect:Site, 27; Site, 4
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                                   Estimate Std. Error        df
## (Intercept)                                       16.10639    9.42920   3.03813
## Prev_year_precip_scaled                           -3.68912    1.58755 647.68688
## PlotSlope_scaled                                  -2.25965    1.70172  55.37062
## Change_BGDensity_scaled                           -7.71703    1.42970 611.18818
## Change_ShrubCover_scaled                           6.29992    1.16242 656.68679
## Change_HerbCover_scaled                            1.11002    1.13625 673.99181
## Init_BGDensity_scaled                             -4.17860    1.66980  67.78832
## Init_ShrubCover_scaled                            -0.05043    1.55826  69.61884
## Init_HerbCover_scaled                              2.06918    1.74675  71.73864
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_BGDensity_scaled    3.00245    1.77953 137.16853
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled  -7.47987    1.40429 456.64488
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled    3.49026    1.22747 452.43789
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled          2.93553    1.23221 621.23820
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled           1.53730    1.25703 632.08160
##                                                  t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                                        1.708  0.18500    
## Prev_year_precip_scaled                           -2.324  0.02045 *  
## PlotSlope_scaled                                  -1.328  0.18967    
## Change_BGDensity_scaled                           -5.398 9.67e-08 ***
## Change_ShrubCover_scaled                           5.420 8.39e-08 ***
## Change_HerbCover_scaled                            0.977  0.32896    
## Init_BGDensity_scaled                             -2.502  0.01475 *  
## Init_ShrubCover_scaled                            -0.032  0.97428    
## Init_HerbCover_scaled                              1.185  0.24009    
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_BGDensity_scaled    1.687  0.09383 .  
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled  -5.326 1.58e-07 ***
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled    2.843  0.00466 ** 
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled          2.382  0.01750 *  
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled           1.223  0.22180    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation matrix not shown by default, as p = 14 > 12.
## Use print(x, correlation=TRUE)  or
##     vcov(x)        if you need it
r2(total)
## # R2 for Mixed Models
## 
##   Conditional R2: 0.466
##      Marginal R2: 0.137
res.total <- simulateResiduals(total)
plotQQunif(res.total)

plotResiduals(res.total)

Predicted vs. observed graph

total.pred <- estimate_expectation(total)
total.pred$Change_TotalCulms <- culm.change$Change_TotalCulms

total.pred.plot <- total.pred %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Change_TotalCulms, y = Predicted)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0,
             linetype = "dashed",
             color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0,
             linetype = "dashed",
             color = "red") +
  ggtitle("Total culm change model, predicted vs. observed") +
  xlab(expression(Delta ~ "Total live culms [observed]")) +
  theme_bw()
total.pred.plot

2. Change in reproductive culm count

Construct model

repro <- lmer(Change_ReproductiveCulms ~ Prev_year_precip_scaled +  
                 PlotSlope_scaled + Change_BGDensity_scaled +
                 Change_ShrubCover_scaled + Change_HerbCover_scaled +
                 Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_BGDensity_scaled +
                 Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_ShrubCover_scaled +
                 Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_HerbCover_scaled +
                 Init_BGDensity_scaled + Init_ShrubCover_scaled + Init_HerbCover_scaled +
                 Change_ShrubCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled +
                 Change_HerbCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled +
                 (1 | Site / Transect / Plot),
               data = culm.change)

Examine diagnostics

summary(repro) 
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: 
## Change_ReproductiveCulms ~ Prev_year_precip_scaled + PlotSlope_scaled +  
##     Change_BGDensity_scaled + Change_ShrubCover_scaled + Change_HerbCover_scaled +  
##     Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_BGDensity_scaled + Prev_year_precip_scaled *  
##     Change_ShrubCover_scaled + Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_HerbCover_scaled +  
##     Init_BGDensity_scaled + Init_ShrubCover_scaled + Init_HerbCover_scaled +  
##     Change_ShrubCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled + Change_HerbCover_scaled *  
##     PlotSlope_scaled + (1 | Site/Transect/Plot)
##    Data: culm.change
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 10903.5
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -4.7775 -0.5358 -0.0110  0.4619  5.0714 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups             Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Plot:Transect:Site (Intercept)   7.27    2.696  
##  Transect:Site      (Intercept)  13.06    3.614  
##  Site               (Intercept)  69.80    8.355  
##  Residual                       311.27   17.643  
## Number of obs: 1268, groups:  
## Plot:Transect:Site, 80; Transect:Site, 27; Site, 4
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                                   Estimate Std. Error        df
## (Intercept)                                        12.2737     4.3312    3.0790
## Prev_year_precip_scaled                            -1.6149     0.9594  812.6087
## PlotSlope_scaled                                    0.1442     0.8554   51.0604
## Change_BGDensity_scaled                            -1.3018     0.8566  696.6020
## Change_ShrubCover_scaled                            1.1347     0.6989  754.3917
## Change_HerbCover_scaled                             3.4310     0.6981 1128.0505
## Init_BGDensity_scaled                              -2.7099     0.8556   71.1368
## Init_ShrubCover_scaled                             -0.9721     0.7928   57.9103
## Init_HerbCover_scaled                               1.4198     0.8862   72.1788
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_BGDensity_scaled    -3.2235     0.9606  106.4970
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled   -1.0017     0.8146  332.4906
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled    -0.4037     0.7096  331.9655
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled           1.6723     0.7365  639.0724
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled           -1.0801     0.7522  697.4575
##                                                  t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                                        2.834  0.06401 .  
## Prev_year_precip_scaled                           -1.683  0.09271 .  
## PlotSlope_scaled                                   0.169  0.86681    
## Change_BGDensity_scaled                           -1.520  0.12904    
## Change_ShrubCover_scaled                           1.624  0.10488    
## Change_HerbCover_scaled                            4.915 1.02e-06 ***
## Init_BGDensity_scaled                             -3.167  0.00227 ** 
## Init_ShrubCover_scaled                            -1.226  0.22509    
## Init_HerbCover_scaled                              1.602  0.11348    
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_BGDensity_scaled   -3.356  0.00110 ** 
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled  -1.230  0.21965    
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled   -0.569  0.56979    
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled          2.271  0.02350 *  
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled          -1.436  0.15147    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation matrix not shown by default, as p = 14 > 12.
## Use print(x, correlation=TRUE)  or
##     vcov(x)        if you need it
r2(repro)
## # R2 for Mixed Models
## 
##   Conditional R2: 0.291
##      Marginal R2: 0.085
res.repro <- simulateResiduals(repro)
plotQQunif(res.repro)

plotResiduals(res.repro)

Predicted vs. observed graph

repro.pred <- estimate_expectation(repro)
repro.pred$Change_ReproductiveCulms <- culm.change$Change_ReproductiveCulms

repro.pred.plot <- repro.pred %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Change_ReproductiveCulms, y = Predicted)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0,
             linetype = "dashed",
             color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0,
             linetype = "dashed",
             color = "red") +
  ggtitle("Reproductive culm change model, predicted vs. observed") +
  xlab(expression(Delta ~ "Reproductive culms [observed]")) +
  theme_bw()
repro.pred.plot

3. Change in plot density

Construct model

bgden <- lmer(Change_BGDensity ~ Prev_year_precip_scaled + 
                 PlotSlope_scaled + Change_ShrubCover_scaled +
                 Change_HerbCover_scaled + 
                 Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_ShrubCover_scaled +
                 Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_HerbCover_scaled +
                 Init_BGDensity_scaled + Init_ShrubCover_scaled + Init_HerbCover_scaled +
                 Change_ShrubCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled +
                 Change_HerbCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled +
                 (1 | Site / Transect),
               data = plot.change)

Examine dianostics

summary(bgden)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: Change_BGDensity ~ Prev_year_precip_scaled + PlotSlope_scaled +  
##     Change_ShrubCover_scaled + Change_HerbCover_scaled + Prev_year_precip_scaled *  
##     Change_ShrubCover_scaled + Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_HerbCover_scaled +  
##     Init_BGDensity_scaled + Init_ShrubCover_scaled + Init_HerbCover_scaled +  
##     Change_ShrubCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled + Change_HerbCover_scaled *  
##     PlotSlope_scaled + (1 | Site/Transect)
##    Data: plot.change
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 831.4
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -3.5138 -0.3836  0.0625  0.3694  3.1628 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups        Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Transect:Site (Intercept)  4.8530  2.203   
##  Site          (Intercept)  0.5807  0.762   
##  Residual                  38.1197  6.174   
## Number of obs: 130, groups:  Transect:Site, 27; Site, 4
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                                   Estimate Std. Error        df
## (Intercept)                                        2.02617    0.86003   0.49817
## Prev_year_precip_scaled                            4.77449    0.76659  13.82935
## PlotSlope_scaled                                   0.08596    0.68226  23.03292
## Change_ShrubCover_scaled                           1.28644    0.68322  83.64503
## Change_HerbCover_scaled                            0.76310    0.73089  87.66536
## Init_BGDensity_scaled                             -1.04600    0.68557  43.43618
## Init_ShrubCover_scaled                             0.23838    0.68703 112.52555
## Init_HerbCover_scaled                              0.53076    0.76537  45.31680
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled   2.24062    0.76322 110.47860
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled    1.00560    0.65040  46.07144
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled          0.47891    0.75047  97.13724
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled           0.56723    0.76523 103.62263
##                                                  t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                                        2.356  0.41336    
## Prev_year_precip_scaled                            6.228 2.33e-05 ***
## PlotSlope_scaled                                   0.126  0.90084    
## Change_ShrubCover_scaled                           1.883  0.06319 .  
## Change_HerbCover_scaled                            1.044  0.29933    
## Init_BGDensity_scaled                             -1.526  0.13433    
## Init_ShrubCover_scaled                             0.347  0.72926    
## Init_HerbCover_scaled                              0.693  0.49156    
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled   2.936  0.00405 ** 
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled    1.546  0.12892    
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled          0.638  0.52488    
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled           0.741  0.46021    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) Prv___ PltSl_ Ch_SC_ Ch_HC_ I_BGD_ In_SC_ In_HC_ P___:C_S
## Prv_yr_prc_  0.122                                                          
## PltSlp_scld  0.006  0.083                                                   
## Chng_ShrbC_  0.096  0.420  0.009                                            
## Chng_HrbCv_  0.029 -0.287  0.001  0.101                                     
## Int_BGDnst_  0.009  0.190  0.084  0.233  0.098                              
## Int_ShrbCv_  0.111  0.109  0.123  0.261  0.004  0.034                       
## Int_HrbCvr_ -0.025 -0.095 -0.080  0.033  0.408  0.062 -0.229                
## Pr___:C_SC_  0.223  0.285  0.144  0.220 -0.036 -0.060  0.346  0.077         
## Pr___:C_HC_ -0.189 -0.033 -0.029 -0.090 -0.238 -0.143  0.024  0.129  0.211  
## PltS_:C_SC_ -0.033  0.100  0.059  0.100  0.016 -0.071  0.137 -0.003  0.341  
## PltS_:C_HC_  0.012  0.184 -0.030  0.167 -0.168 -0.090  0.085 -0.019  0.292  
##             P___:C_H PS_:C_S
## Prv_yr_prc_                 
## PltSlp_scld                 
## Chng_ShrbC_                 
## Chng_HrbCv_                 
## Int_BGDnst_                 
## Int_ShrbCv_                 
## Int_HrbCvr_                 
## Pr___:C_SC_                 
## Pr___:C_HC_                 
## PltS_:C_SC_  0.226          
## PltS_:C_HC_  0.336    0.462
r2(bgden)
## # R2 for Mixed Models
## 
##   Conditional R2: 0.456
##      Marginal R2: 0.378
res.bgden <- simulateResiduals(bgden)
plotQQunif(res.bgden)

plotResiduals(res.bgden) 

check_collinearity(bgden)
## # Check for Multicollinearity
## 
## Low Correlation
## 
##                                              Term  VIF   VIF 95% CI adj. VIF
##                           Prev_year_precip_scaled 1.56 [1.31, 2.00]     1.25
##                                  PlotSlope_scaled 1.06 [1.00, 2.12]     1.03
##                          Change_ShrubCover_scaled 1.45 [1.24, 1.86]     1.20
##                           Change_HerbCover_scaled 1.62 [1.35, 2.07]     1.27
##                             Init_BGDensity_scaled 1.14 [1.03, 1.57]     1.07
##                            Init_ShrubCover_scaled 1.33 [1.15, 1.71]     1.15
##                             Init_HerbCover_scaled 1.45 [1.24, 1.86]     1.21
##  Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled 1.49 [1.26, 1.91]     1.22
##   Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled 1.35 [1.17, 1.74]     1.16
##         PlotSlope_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled 1.39 [1.19, 1.79]     1.18
##          PlotSlope_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled 1.48 [1.26, 1.90]     1.22
##  Tolerance Tolerance 95% CI
##       0.64     [0.50, 0.76]
##       0.95     [0.47, 1.00]
##       0.69     [0.54, 0.81]
##       0.62     [0.48, 0.74]
##       0.88     [0.64, 0.97]
##       0.75     [0.58, 0.87]
##       0.69     [0.54, 0.81]
##       0.67     [0.52, 0.79]
##       0.74     [0.57, 0.86]
##       0.72     [0.56, 0.84]
##       0.67     [0.53, 0.79]

Predicted vs. observed graph

bgden.pred <- estimate_expectation(bgden)
bgden.pred$Change_BGDensity <- plot.change$Change_BGDensity

bgden.pred.plot <- bgden.pred %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Change_BGDensity, y = Predicted)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0,
             linetype = "dashed",
             color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0,
             linetype = "dashed",
             color = "red") +
  ggtitle("Density change model, predicted vs. observed") +
  xlab(expression(Delta ~ paste("Buffelgrass density (individuals / ", m^2, ") [observed]"))) +
  theme_bw()
bgden.pred.plot

4. Change in plot cover

Construct model

bgcov <- lmer(Change_BGCover ~ Prev_year_precip_scaled + 
                 PlotSlope_scaled + Change_ShrubCover_scaled +
                 Change_HerbCover_scaled + 
                 Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_ShrubCover_scaled +
                 Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_HerbCover_scaled +
                 Init_BGCover_scaled + Init_ShrubCover_scaled + Init_HerbCover_scaled +
                 Change_ShrubCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled +
                 Change_HerbCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled +
                 (1 | Site),
               data = plot.change)

Examine diagnostics

summary(bgcov)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: Change_BGCover ~ Prev_year_precip_scaled + PlotSlope_scaled +  
##     Change_ShrubCover_scaled + Change_HerbCover_scaled + Prev_year_precip_scaled *  
##     Change_ShrubCover_scaled + Prev_year_precip_scaled * Change_HerbCover_scaled +  
##     Init_BGCover_scaled + Init_ShrubCover_scaled + Init_HerbCover_scaled +  
##     Change_ShrubCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled + Change_HerbCover_scaled *  
##     PlotSlope_scaled + (1 | Site)
##    Data: plot.change
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 1041
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -2.76138 -0.61373 -0.02591  0.62772  2.10825 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Site     (Intercept)   2.804   1.674  
##  Residual             246.054  15.686  
## Number of obs: 130, groups:  Site, 4
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                                    Estimate Std. Error
## (Intercept)                                        1.424251   1.789352
## Prev_year_precip_scaled                            7.173628   1.778748
## PlotSlope_scaled                                   1.528945   1.486927
## Change_ShrubCover_scaled                          -1.852055   1.621398
## Change_HerbCover_scaled                            2.184705   1.819355
## Init_BGCover_scaled                               -6.220648   1.579298
## Init_ShrubCover_scaled                            -2.608081   1.666396
## Init_HerbCover_scaled                              0.238069   1.840937
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled  -0.365903   1.870378
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled    0.007005   1.531060
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled          2.414419   1.852220
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled          -0.122564   1.875574
##                                                          df t value Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept)                                        2.443422   0.796 0.496056
## Prev_year_precip_scaled                           27.201024   4.033 0.000401
## PlotSlope_scaled                                 101.042240   1.028 0.306284
## Change_ShrubCover_scaled                         100.105560  -1.142 0.256072
## Change_HerbCover_scaled                          117.996609   1.201 0.232229
## Init_BGCover_scaled                              108.857651  -3.939 0.000145
## Init_ShrubCover_scaled                           111.644569  -1.565 0.120389
## Init_HerbCover_scaled                            114.096112   0.129 0.897333
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled 115.896456  -0.196 0.845242
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled   72.730520   0.005 0.996362
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled        117.974880   1.304 0.194933
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled         117.998601  -0.065 0.948008
##                                                     
## (Intercept)                                         
## Prev_year_precip_scaled                          ***
## PlotSlope_scaled                                    
## Change_ShrubCover_scaled                            
## Change_HerbCover_scaled                             
## Init_BGCover_scaled                              ***
## Init_ShrubCover_scaled                              
## Init_HerbCover_scaled                               
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled    
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled     
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_ShrubCover_scaled           
## PlotSlope_scaled:Change_HerbCover_scaled            
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) Prv___ PltSl_ Ch_SC_ Ch_HC_ I_BGC_ In_SC_ In_HC_ P___:C_S
## Prv_yr_prc_  0.121                                                          
## PltSlp_scld  0.028  0.059                                                   
## Chng_ShrbC_  0.091  0.352 -0.009                                            
## Chng_HrbCv_  0.043 -0.330  0.018  0.077                                     
## Int_BGCvr_s  0.044 -0.087  0.207  0.055  0.143                              
## Int_ShrbCv_  0.130  0.071  0.174  0.295  0.041  0.156                       
## Int_HrbCvr_ -0.016 -0.169  0.002 -0.008  0.458  0.352 -0.167                
## Pr___:C_SC_  0.273  0.261  0.177  0.239 -0.008  0.163  0.374  0.121         
## Pr___:C_HC_ -0.188 -0.013  0.005 -0.018 -0.214  0.113  0.014  0.164  0.228  
## PltS_:C_SC_ -0.031  0.136  0.079  0.126  0.024 -0.014  0.159 -0.007  0.342  
## PltS_:C_HC_  0.018  0.194 -0.042  0.203 -0.140  0.000  0.072 -0.021  0.286  
##             P___:C_H PS_:C_S
## Prv_yr_prc_                 
## PltSlp_scld                 
## Chng_ShrbC_                 
## Chng_HrbCv_                 
## Int_BGCvr_s                 
## Int_ShrbCv_                 
## Int_HrbCvr_                 
## Pr___:C_SC_                 
## Pr___:C_HC_                 
## PltS_:C_SC_  0.225          
## PltS_:C_HC_  0.335    0.455
r2(bgcov)
## # R2 for Mixed Models
## 
##   Conditional R2: 0.306
##      Marginal R2: 0.298
res.bgcov <- simulateResiduals(bgcov)
plotQQunif(res.bgcov)

plotResiduals(res.bgcov)

Predicted vs. observed graph

bgcov.pred <- estimate_expectation(bgcov)
bgcov.pred$Change_BGCover <- plot.change$Change_BGCover

bgcov.pred.plot <- bgcov.pred %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Change_BGCover, y = Predicted)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0,
             linetype = "dashed",
             color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0,
             linetype = "dashed",
             color = "red") +
  ggtitle("Cover change model, predicted vs. observed") +
  xlab(expression(Delta ~ "Buffelgrass cover (%) [observed]")) +
  theme_bw()
bgcov.pred.plot

5. Seedling survival

Construct model

survival <- glmer(cbind(seedlings_surviving,
                         remaining_toothpicks - seedlings_surviving) ~ Prev_year_precip_scaled + 
                     PlotSlope_scaled + BGDensity_scaled +
                     ShrubCover_scaled + HerbCover_scaled + 
                     Prev_year_precip_scaled * BGDensity_scaled + 
                     Prev_year_precip_scaled * ShrubCover_scaled +
                     Prev_year_precip_scaled * HerbCover_scaled +
                     ShrubCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled +
                     HerbCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled +
                     (1 | Site / Transect / Plot),
                   family = binomial,
                   data = dat.survival)

Examine diagnostics

summary(survival)
## Generalized linear mixed model fit by maximum likelihood (Laplace
##   Approximation) [glmerMod]
##  Family: binomial  ( logit )
## Formula: 
## cbind(seedlings_surviving, remaining_toothpicks - seedlings_surviving) ~  
##     Prev_year_precip_scaled + PlotSlope_scaled + BGDensity_scaled +  
##         ShrubCover_scaled + HerbCover_scaled + Prev_year_precip_scaled *  
##         BGDensity_scaled + Prev_year_precip_scaled * ShrubCover_scaled +  
##         Prev_year_precip_scaled * HerbCover_scaled + ShrubCover_scaled *  
##         PlotSlope_scaled + HerbCover_scaled * PlotSlope_scaled +  
##         (1 | Site/Transect/Plot)
##    Data: dat.survival
## 
##       AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
##     806.0     848.2    -389.0     778.0       137 
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -2.7424 -1.0502 -0.3230  0.8534  4.8182 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups             Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Plot:Transect:Site (Intercept) 0.05013  0.2239  
##  Transect:Site      (Intercept) 0.21938  0.4684  
##  Site               (Intercept) 2.02094  1.4216  
## Number of obs: 151, groups:  Plot:Transect:Site, 71; Transect:Site, 24; Site, 4
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                           Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)                               -1.60539    0.72398  -2.217 0.026591
## Prev_year_precip_scaled                    1.50034    0.08545  17.559  < 2e-16
## PlotSlope_scaled                           0.03679    0.09601   0.383 0.701621
## BGDensity_scaled                           0.34005    0.08965   3.793 0.000149
## ShrubCover_scaled                         -0.16098    0.07048  -2.284 0.022366
## HerbCover_scaled                           0.11765    0.07230   1.627 0.103696
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:BGDensity_scaled   0.08339    0.09153   0.911 0.362253
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:ShrubCover_scaled -0.09431    0.06508  -1.449 0.147286
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:HerbCover_scaled  -0.07048    0.07272  -0.969 0.332441
## PlotSlope_scaled:ShrubCover_scaled        -0.10891    0.06981  -1.560 0.118746
## PlotSlope_scaled:HerbCover_scaled         -0.08246    0.06542  -1.261 0.207468
##                                              
## (Intercept)                               *  
## Prev_year_precip_scaled                   ***
## PlotSlope_scaled                             
## BGDensity_scaled                          ***
## ShrubCover_scaled                         *  
## HerbCover_scaled                             
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:BGDensity_scaled     
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:ShrubCover_scaled    
## Prev_year_precip_scaled:HerbCover_scaled     
## PlotSlope_scaled:ShrubCover_scaled           
## PlotSlope_scaled:HerbCover_scaled            
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) Prv___ PltSl_ BGDns_ ShrbC_ HrbCv_ P___:B P___:S P___:H
## Prv_yr_prc_ -0.054                                                        
## PltSlp_scld -0.005  0.103                                                 
## BGDnsty_scl -0.031 -0.003  0.095                                          
## ShrbCvr_scl  0.007 -0.032  0.121  0.059                                   
## HrbCvr_scld  0.024 -0.266 -0.125 -0.252  0.092                            
## Prv___:BGD_  0.002  0.178 -0.008 -0.530 -0.047  0.123                     
## Prv_y__:SC_ -0.013  0.085  0.152 -0.072 -0.048 -0.074  0.240              
## Prv_y__:HC_ -0.033 -0.116 -0.094  0.371 -0.146 -0.310 -0.213 -0.377       
## PltSlp_:SC_ -0.006  0.082  0.098  0.186  0.145 -0.092 -0.110  0.323 -0.065
## PltSlp_:HC_ -0.011  0.035 -0.184  0.025 -0.060 -0.264  0.102  0.049  0.177
##             PS_:SC
## Prv_yr_prc_       
## PltSlp_scld       
## BGDnsty_scl       
## ShrbCvr_scl       
## HrbCvr_scld       
## Prv___:BGD_       
## Prv_y__:SC_       
## Prv_y__:HC_       
## PltSlp_:SC_       
## PltSlp_:HC_  0.163
r2(survival) 
## # R2 for Mixed Models
## 
##   Conditional R2: 0.963
##      Marginal R2: 0.492
res.survival <- simulateResiduals(survival)
plotQQunif(res.survival)

plotResiduals(res.survival) 
## Warning in newton(lsp = lsp, X = G$X, y = G$y, Eb = G$Eb, UrS = G$UrS, L = G$L,
## : Fitting terminated with step failure - check results carefully

check_collinearity(survival)
## # Check for Multicollinearity
## 
## Low Correlation
## 
##                                       Term  VIF   VIF 95% CI adj. VIF Tolerance
##                    Prev_year_precip_scaled 1.21 [1.08, 1.56]     1.10      0.83
##                           PlotSlope_scaled 1.14 [1.03, 1.53]     1.07      0.88
##                           BGDensity_scaled 1.69 [1.42, 2.15]     1.30      0.59
##                          ShrubCover_scaled 1.10 [1.02, 1.56]     1.05      0.91
##                           HerbCover_scaled 1.44 [1.24, 1.82]     1.20      0.70
##   Prev_year_precip_scaled:BGDensity_scaled 1.63 [1.38, 2.06]     1.28      0.61
##  Prev_year_precip_scaled:ShrubCover_scaled 1.53 [1.30, 1.93]     1.23      0.66
##   Prev_year_precip_scaled:HerbCover_scaled 1.67 [1.40, 2.11]     1.29      0.60
##         PlotSlope_scaled:ShrubCover_scaled 1.28 [1.12, 1.63]     1.13      0.78
##          PlotSlope_scaled:HerbCover_scaled 1.22 [1.09, 1.57]     1.11      0.82
##  Tolerance 95% CI
##      [0.64, 0.93]
##      [0.65, 0.97]
##      [0.47, 0.70]
##      [0.64, 0.98]
##      [0.55, 0.81]
##      [0.48, 0.73]
##      [0.52, 0.77]
##      [0.47, 0.71]
##      [0.62, 0.89]
##      [0.64, 0.92]

Predicted vs. observed graph

survival.pred <- estimate_expectation(survival)
survival.pred$survival_prop <- dat.survival$survival_prop

survival.pred.plot <- survival.pred %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = survival_prop, y = Predicted)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
  ggtitle("Seedling survival model, predicted vs. observed")  +
  xlab("Proportion of surviving seedlings [observed]") +
  theme_bw() 
survival.pred.plot

6. Simple linear regression

Shrub cover change vs. precipitation

To accompany Figure S3a.

summary(lm(Change_ShrubCover ~ Prev_year_precip, data = plot.change))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Change_ShrubCover ~ Prev_year_precip, data = plot.change)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -21.612  -5.612  -0.460   5.250  49.128 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                  Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)      20.15349    4.65718   4.327 3.01e-05 ***
## Prev_year_precip -0.07086    0.01593  -4.447 1.87e-05 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 9.57 on 128 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1338, Adjusted R-squared:  0.1271 
## F-statistic: 19.78 on 1 and 128 DF,  p-value: 1.867e-05

Grass & forb cover change vs. precipitation

To accompany Figure S3b.

summary(lm(Change_HerbCover ~ Prev_year_precip, data = plot.change))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Change_HerbCover ~ Prev_year_precip, data = plot.change)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -36.267  -3.837   1.538   5.275  26.742 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                   Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)      -21.67083    4.70905  -4.602 9.94e-06 ***
## Prev_year_precip   0.06795    0.01611   4.218 4.63e-05 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 9.676 on 128 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.122,  Adjusted R-squared:  0.1152 
## F-statistic: 17.79 on 1 and 128 DF,  p-value: 4.633e-05

Buffelgrass density change vs. cover change

To accompany Figure S8.

summary(lm(Change_BGDensity ~ Change_BGCover, data = culm.change))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Change_BGDensity ~ Change_BGCover, data = culm.change)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -22.8297  -4.0611  -0.1506   3.2874  26.8848 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)     1.21313    0.20916    5.80 8.37e-09 ***
## Change_BGCover  0.18209    0.01143   15.94  < 2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 7.413 on 1266 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1671, Adjusted R-squared:  0.1664 
## F-statistic:   254 on 1 and 1266 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16

Buffelgrass culm count change vs. cover change

To accompany Figure S9.

summary(lm(Change_TotalCulms ~ Change_BGCover, data = culm.change))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Change_TotalCulms ~ Change_BGCover, data = culm.change)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -147.456  -21.520   -8.771   14.558  206.229 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)    17.45566    1.06381  16.409   <2e-16 ***
## Change_BGCover -0.13695    0.05811  -2.357   0.0186 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 37.7 on 1266 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.004368,   Adjusted R-squared:  0.003581 
## F-statistic: 5.554 on 1 and 1266 DF,  p-value: 0.01859
